_doc: The Genie capability manifest — every agent AUTO built, exposed as a plugin skill. cost tags: 'free' = local compute, no COGS, never gated. 'metered' = burns OUR paid credits → free_per_day free uses (daily reset), then the user must BYOK for that provider. 'gated:money' = touches funds → NEVER auto-runs, explicit AUTO/owner yes only (money-gate). Edit this file to add/retag agents; run tools/wrap_agents.py to regenerate the SKILL.md set.

capabilities.name: recall
capabilities.triggers: recall, search my memory/chain, 'have we done X', find a skill, echo the void
capabilities.summary: Search the shared Wildflower Chain for a skill/answer. Networked (works on any machine), free.

capabilities.name: inscribe
capabilities.triggers: save this skill to chain, inscribe, record what I learned, put it on the chain
capabilities.summary: Write a skill/idea to the shared chain under your marker. Near-free.

capabilities.name: pm-runner
capabilities.triggers: PM coaching, plan this project, research + draft, product-manager advice, break down a roadmap

capabilities.name: video-genie
capabilities.triggers: make a video, build a promo clip, generate a branded video, caption + stitch clips
capabilities.summary: Branded video maker: generates captions + stitches clips into an .mp4 (ffmpeg). Caption gen uses Claude.

capabilities.name: sales-copilot
capabilities.triggers: write a sales pitch, outreach, cold DM, proposal draft, close this lead
capabilities.summary: Drafts outreach / proposals / follow-ups. Uses Claude.

capabilities.name: upwork-agent
capabilities.triggers: find upwork gigs, draft a proposal for this job, bid, freelance leads
capabilities.summary: Scouts + drafts Upwork proposals. Uses Claude.

capabilities.name: email-concierge
capabilities.triggers: triage my inbox, draft a reply, summarize emails, handle my mail
capabilities.summary: Reads/triages/drafts email (Google auth managed; drafting uses Claude).

capabilities.name: meeting-notes
capabilities.triggers: summarize this meeting, action items, meeting notes, recap the call
capabilities.summary: Turns a meeting/transcript into notes + action items. Uses Claude.

capabilities.name: botfactory
capabilities.triggers: spin up a bot, make me an agent, build a custom worker
capabilities.summary: Spins up a new task-specific bot. Uses Claude.

capabilities.name: workshop-team
capabilities.triggers: run the team, multi-agent workshop, get a panel on this
capabilities.summary: Multi-agent panel/workshop over a problem. Uses Claude (fans out).

capabilities.name: chart-intel
capabilities.triggers: chart this token, on-chain read, wallet flow, convergence check
capabilities.summary: On-chain chart + flow intel. Uses paid RPC (Helius).

capabilities.name: trade
capabilities.triggers: trade, buy, sell, swap, ape, exit
capabilities.summary: ⛔ MONEY-GATE: touches funds. NEVER auto-runs — explicit owner yes per action, BYOK wallet only.
